User.title: User
User.description: Represents a registered user of the RIZERWEBNP platform, allowing them to log in and manage their website requests.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for communication and login.

phone.description: The primary phone number of the user.

whatsAppNumber.description: The WhatsApp number of the user for direct messaging.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was last updated.

WebsiteType.title: WebsiteType
WebsiteType.description: Defines the different categories or types of websites RIZERWEBNP offers, displayed in the 'Website Types Page'.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WebsiteType entity.

name.description: The name of the website type (e.g., 'Business Website', 'Ecommerce Website').

description.description: A brief description of what this website type entails.

startingPrice.description: The starting price for this type of website.

imageUrl.description: URL to an illustrative image for this website type.

WebsiteRequest.title: WebsiteRequest
WebsiteRequest.description: Stores the detailed requirements and contact information for a custom website request submitted through the form.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WebsiteRequest entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who submitted this request, if logged in.

fullName.description: The full name of the person submitting the request.

phoneNumber.description: The primary phone number for contact.

whatsAppNumber.description: The WhatsApp number for direct communication.

budgetAmount.description: The budget specified by the user.

websiteTitle.description: The proposed title of the requested website.

websiteDescription.description: A detailed description of the website requirements.

functionsRequired.description: Specific functions or features the website needs.

pagesNeeded.description: Description or number of pages required.

designStyle.description: User's ideas for the website's design.

extraFeatures.description: Any additional features or specific requests.

status.description: The current status of the website request.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the website request was submitted.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the website request was last updated.

Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description: Global announcements displayed on the homepage.

definition.description: Definitions of different website categories offered.
Website requests submitted by logged-in users.
Website requests submitted by non-logged-in users.
Flat requests collection used by the admin panel for easy management.
